chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-5482 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition. 17.11.2025. None present. ___________________ On the last date of hearing, the petitioner was confronted as to maintainability of the Petition. Today, this is the second call, still the petitioner is not present. Dismissed for non prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
